reason: Response B exhibits the more distinctive hallmarks of Opus's writing: unexpected, precise metaphors ("memorized you — your weight on the floorboards"), a philosophical pivot that reframes the entire premise ("home was never a location but a quality of attention we once received without asking"), and a layered density of thought compressed into few words. Response A is polished and coherent but leans on more conventional phrasing and a straightforward structure that feels more like a capable imitator hitting expected notes. Opus tends toward the kind of surprising conceptual leap that B delivers with "phantom home" and "quality of attention."
